data_policy_id.description: User-assigned (human readable) ID of the data policy that needs to be unique within a project. Used as {dataPolicyId} in part of the resource name.

location.description: The name of the location of the data policy.

policy_tag.description: Policy tag resource name, in the format of projects/{project_number}/locations/{locationId}/taxonomies/{taxonomyId}/policyTags/{policyTag_id}.

data_policy_type.description: The enrollment level of the service. Possible values are: `COLUMN_LEVEL_SECURITY_POLICY`, `DATA_MASKING_POLICY`.

data_masking_policy.description: The data masking policy that specifies the data masking rule to use. Structure is [documented below](#nested_data_masking_policy).

predefined_expression.description: The available masking rules. Learn more here: https://cloud.google.com/bigquery/docs/column-data-masking-intro#masking_options. Possible values are: `SHA256`, `ALWAYS_NULL`, `DEFAULT_MASKING_VALUE`, `LAST_FOUR_CHARACTERS`, `FIRST_FOUR_CHARACTERS`, `EMAIL_MASK`, `DATE_YEAR_MASK`.

routine.description: The name of the BigQuery routine that contains the custom masking routine, in the format of projects/{projectNumber}/datasets/{dataset_id}/routines/{routine_id}.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
